edges.original_sentence: In the forest ﬂoors, abundances of all microbial groups were reduced and pH and availabilities of Ca 2+,M g2+ and PO3/C0 4 were increased in all burned treatments.

source_spans.text: In the forest ﬂoors, abundances of all microbial groups were reduced and pH and availabilities of Ca 2+,M g2+ and PO3/C0 4 were increased in all burned treatments.

source_document.title: Changes in soil chemical and biological properties after thinning and prescribed fire for ecosystem restoration in a Rocky Mountain Douglas-fir forest

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:3baa828a9aff
edges.original_sentence: Forest ﬂoor pH in all burned plots increased signiﬁcantly after the ﬁre.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:3baa828a9aff
edges.original_sentence: Forest ﬂoor C and N contents were reduced in burned plots by an average of 39% and 44% respectively.

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:6bc040c954cd
edges.original_sentence: Fire-induced increases in pH 10 days after the ﬁre were associated with declines in all microbial groups.
